task: Analyze the embedded packet of pulse schedule records and limits to produce an auditable triage: select pulse control changes under fidelity constraints, convert the packet into an evidence table with record-level citations, include validation checks, sensitivity analysis, unresolved assumptions, and a final recommendation table. Deliver an .xlsx (pulse_leakage_triage.xlsx) with formulas/executable logic and an .md (control_change.md) report describing decisions, rationale, and validation steps. Use only the provided embedded packet values; mark any record with confidence <0.70, missing provenance, or contradictory data as needs_review.
